sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import './Rules.css'; const Rule=()=>{ return(

INSTRUCTION FOR MESS INMATES

  1. CAUTION DEPOSIT WILL BE RETURNED ONLY BY THE END OF THE ACADEMIC YEAR.
  2. ANY CORRECTION IN THE MESS BILL SHOULD BE INFORMED WITHIN 5 DAYS AFTER PUBLISHING THE MESS BILL.
  3. MESS INMATES ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT THE MESS SECRETARY FOR BILL PAYMEMNT IF THEY ARE OUT OF STATION.
  4. FINE IMPOSED WILL BE FINAL.
  5. SHARING MEALS ARE NOT PERMITTED.
  6. INMATES ARE NOT ALLOWED TO TAKE MESS UTENSILS OUT OF MESS.
  7. HAVING FOOD AFTER MESS TIME IS STRICTLY PROHIBITED FOR ALL INMATES. STRICT ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN.
  8. MESS INMATES ARE REQUESTED TO UPDATE THE MESS REGISTER WITH JOINING DATE, EXTRAS, SELF GUESTS, GUESTS AND REDUCTIONS. FAILURE TO DO SO WILL BE FINED.
  9. MESS INMATES ARE REQUESTED TO HAVE FOOD INSIDE THE MESS. NOBODY IS PERMITTED TO TAKE FOOD OUT OF THE MESS.
  10. ANY ADJUSTMENT IN MESS TIMING FOR ANY DEPARTMENT STUDENTS MUST BE ADDRESSED TO THE MESS COMMITTEE IN ADVANCE.
  11. ALL MESS INMATES MUST SHOW MESS ID CARD BEFORE HAVING FOOD.
  12. EXTRAS PROVIDED WILL BE LIMITED, SO IT WILL BE BASED ON FIRST COME FIRST SERVE.
  13. FEASTS WILL BE PROVIDED ONCE IN A MONTH AND THE DATE WILL BE INTIMATED BY THE MESS SECRETARY.
  14. LATE MESS SHOULD BE INFORMED TO THE MESS COMMITTEE IN ADVANCE.
  15. MESS CUT WILL ONLY BE APPLICABLE FOR A MINIMUM OF 3 CONSECUTIVE DAYS.
  16. MESS CUT SHALL BE ENTERED IN THE MESS REGISTER AND SHOULD BE INFORMED TO THE MESS COMMITTEE IN ADVANCE.
  17. DECISION OF THE MESS SECRETARY WILL BE FINAL.
); }; export default Rule;
